title: HEAT ADVISORY
detail: THE NATIONAL WEATHER SERVICE IN PHILADELPHIA COUNTY HAS ISSUED AN EXCESSIVE HEAT WARNING...WHICH IS IN EFFECT FROM 11 AM SATURDAY TO 8 PM EDT SUNDAY.

title: Closures
detail: All Philadelphia schools will be closed from 12/24/24-01/09/25

title: Construction
detail: Street construction between 1st and Washington Ave. may cause bus route disruptions.

title: Local event
detail: Block party on State St. between 7th Ave. and 8th Ave. Street will be closed to traffic 2PM-8PM.
